name: FIFA+ - When the World Watched (2022)
plot: The stories of the greatest World Cup winning sides like you've never seen them before. Complete with interviews with the legendary players and coaches, all beautifully illustrated with rare archival footage.

name: FIFA+ - Under Pressure (2023)
plot: The U.S. Women's National Team set out to make history at the 2023 FIFA World Cup - but faced a series of unexpected challenges along the way.

name: FIFA+ - The Long Walk (2023)
plot: An in-depth series that looks into the most dramatic penalty shootouts at the FIFA World Cup, speaks to the heroes and the villains and tries to discover the answer to the perfect penalty.

name: FIFA+ - The Final (2022)
plot: This four-part series relives some of the most recent FIFA World Cup and FIFA Women's World Cup finals through the eyes of those who were there.

name: FIFA+ - The Believers (2023)
plot: Fan voice short films from content creators sourced from all around the globe.

name: FIFA+ - Sheroes (2023)
plot: Discover how Abiha Haider overcame her biggest fear of failure in front of her relatives to become a face of Pakistan and stand up for muslim women in sports all around the world.

name: FIFA+ - Queen of WE (2023)
plot: The series closely follows people involved in Japan's WE League (Japanese professional women's football) from a unique perspective, looking at their struggles and pains from different perspectives and thoughts, and what they hope to achieve by playing in the WE League.

name: FIFA+ - Mysteries of Football (2023)
plot: Football is full of incredible stories: matches in which UFO sightings, stadiums built on top of cemeteries and curses that kept teams from being champions for decades. Mysteries of Football sets out to investigate the links between the sport and the world of the unexplained.

name: FIFA+ - Life in Spain (2022)
plot: Three films that show beautiful scenes of Spain and focus on the thoughts and feelings of Japanese footballers playing in the Spanish league and the challenges they face adapting both on and off the pitch.

name: FIFA+ - Life in GB (2023)
plot: This engaging “travel-log” style series will not only focus on their individual footballing achievements to date, but also aims to offer a more personal insight into how each of these young men has adjusted to their new surroundings, and what the cities of Wolverhampton, Glasgow, and London can offer our audience, from a historical and cultural perspective.

name: FIFA+ - Kariobangi (2023)
plot: Centered on the remarkable story of the Kariobangi Sharks, who went from street footballers to a Premier League side – following members of their team now chasing World Cup qualification with Kenya, and young street footballers hoping to make it as professional players.

name: FIFA+ - Icons (2022)
plot: From the very beginnings to the very top of the game, embark on an inspirational journey in the world of women's football through the stories of five of it's greatest ever players.

name: FIFA+ - Her Way (2023)
plot: "Her Way" isn't just about reaching the pinnacle, but rather how these exemplary figures did it. The journey of extraordinary athletes who have taken risks into the unique paths they have carved.

name: FIFA+ - Heart of the Taegeuk Warriors (2022)
plot: The individuals and events who have shaped the face of the game in the Republic of Korea. Looking at those who set the stage, those who fly the flag, and those set to be the next big thing.

name: FIFA+ - HD Cutz (2022)
plot: Have you ever wondered how football superstars are able to look so fresh every time they step on the pitch? Wonder no further as this behind-the-scenes series brings you right into the heart of the exclusive HD Cutz barber shop in Clapham, London. As well as following owner Sheldon Edwards around the country, as he tends to some of the most important footballers in the world.

name: FIFA+ - Golden Boot (2023)
plot: 1986 Golden Boot winner and Britain's leading sports broadcaster Gary Lineker travels the world to meet iconic FIFA World Cup strikers from different football eras. Follow him in this series of interview based profile films.

name: FIFA+ - Goal to Goal (2022)
plot: Goal to Goal looks at the science behind football - what makes a great free kick curl past the wall and into the net, how a warm up keeps players running all game, and how goal keepers can make saves against impossible odds.

name: FIFA+ - Eyes of the World (2022)
plot: The FIFA Men’s and Women’s World Cups create iconic footballing moments like no other tournaments on the planet. Moments that capture the attention of the entire watching world. ‘Eyes of the World’ explores the stories behind these moments, showcasing the joy and the sadness, the genius and the artistry, the scandal and the rivalries.

name: FIFA+ - Discovering (2023)
plot: The series shines the spotlight on those players who, despite never being able to lift the coveted trophy, have left an indelible mark on the World Cup through both their footballing prowess and their extravagant personalities.

name: FIFA+ - Creator Network (2022)
plot: The Creator Network series features a variety of short films, from content creators all over the world, that help shed light on some of the most unusual and fascinating global football stories.

name: FIFA+ - Captains of the World (2023) (GB)
plot: From the locker room to the pitch, this docuseries offers exclusive access to all 32 teams as they fight for football glory in the 2022 FIFA World Cup.
cast: Lionel Messi, Kylian Mbappé, Luka Modrić, Cristiano Ronaldo, Olivier Giroud, Didier Deschamps, Kingsley Coman, Lionel Scaloni

name: FIFA+ - Captains (2022) (GB)
plot: Six captains from six different confederations attempt to qualify for the 2022 World Cup in Qatar.

name: FIFA+ - Captain Fantastic (2022)
plot: Told through the eyes of Chhetri himself, his family, his closest associates, and an array of luminaries from the world of football and beyond, “Captain Fantastic” traces the career of India’s most successful footballer from childhood to stardom, and attempts to paint a complete portrait of the man that wears the #11 jersey. From Chhetri’s early days as a wary youngster courting his coach’s daughter, to the ultra-competitive opponent that won’t concede family board games, to the modern-day skipper that inspires youngsters with his fitness and drive — discover all the untold tales of Sunil Chhetri here.

name: FIFA+ - Asia Stories (2023)
plot: Asia Stories brings together passionate football people from six different nations across the continent.

name: FIFA+ - All Time Top 10s (2022)
plot: From the most iconic Women's World Cup moments to the most heartbreaking moments for the English national team. Relive some of the most fascinating moments in the history of FIFA's most important competitions.

name: FIFA+ - All Roads Lead Down Under (2023)
plot: All Roads Lead Down Under takes you behind the scenes as teams from all over the globe try and secure their qualification for the FIFA Women's World Cup 2023.

name: FIFA+ - Africa Stories (2023)
plot: In this exclusive series discover five unique and touching stories, each showcasing the impact football has on a continent obsessed with the beautiful game.

name: FIFA+ - Academies (2022)
plot: Have you ever wondered what it takes to go from talented youngster to member of the first team? This behind-the-scenes series takes you right into the heart of some of the most established youth academies in the world.

name: FIFA+ - A Nation's Story (2019)
plot: ‘A Nation’s Story’ gives you a unique look at the stories of the four semi-finalists at the FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022. Featuring exclusive interviews with players and coaches, and footage from FIFA’s film cameras, the series provides a fresh perspective on the journey’s at the tournament.
